data.name: Abrade
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Abrade deals 3 damage to target creature.
• Destroy target artifact.
data.flavor_text: The desert is a voracious beast, devouring both flesh and stone.

data.name: Aetherize
data.oracle_text: Return all attacking creatures to their owner's hand.
data.flavor_text: "You can come back once you've learned some manners—and figured out how to reconstitute your physical forms."

data.name: Affectionate Indrik
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may have it fight target creature you don't control. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)
data.flavor_text: The problem isn't the indrik's enthusiasm, it's Ravnica's lack of guardrails.

data.name: Angelic Edict
data.oracle_text: Exile target creature or enchantment.
data.flavor_text: The Boros built a prison in the sky where Azorius statutes couldn't restrict their sense of justice.

data.name: An Offer You Can't Refuse
data.oracle_text: Counter target noncreature spell. Its controller creates two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
data.flavor_text: "I think you'll find my terms quite agreeable, if you know what's good for you."

data.name: Ayli, Eternal Pilgrim
data.oracle_text:
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
{1}, Sacrifice another creature: You gain life equal to the sacrificed creature's toughness.
{1}{W}{B}, Sacrifice another creature: Exile target nonland permanent. Activate only if you have at least 10 life more than your starting life total.

data.name: Bake into a Pie
data.oracle_text: Destroy target creature. Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
data.flavor_text: "My secret ingredient? Well, I can't tell you that. But here's a hint. It's not love."

data.name: Banishing Light
data.oracle_text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.
data.flavor_text:
The Champion reached for a stone, and Heliod placed the sun into her hand.
—*The Theriad*

data.name: Bigfin Bouncer
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, return target creature an opponent controls to its owner's hand.
data.flavor_text: "You know how to swim, don't ya, chum?"

data.name: Bite Down
data.oracle_text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control.
data.flavor_text:
"All the fancy spells and diabolical machines in the Multiverse are nothing compared to a good chomp."
—Vivien Reid

data.name: Blasphemous Edict
data.oracle_text:
You may pay {B} rather than pay this spell's mana cost if there are thirteen or more creatures on the battlefield.
Each player sacrifices thirteen creatures of their choice.
data.flavor_text:
"A demonic pact is all fun and games until the bill comes due."
—Liliana Vess

data.name: Boltwave
data.oracle_text: Boltwave deals 3 damage to each opponent.
data.flavor_text:
"Taming a storm is like taming a wild beast; once you understand its wants and needs, you can direct it any way you like."
—Ral Zarek

data.name: Boros Charm
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Boros Charm deals 4 damage to target player or planeswalker.
• Permanents you control gain indestructible until end of turn.
• Target creature gains double strike until end of turn.

data.name: Broken Wings
data.oracle_text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying.
data.flavor_text:
"Serra guides our shots true. Also, I just tuned the cannons."
—Tiana

data.name: Burst Lightning
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.)
Burst Lightning deals 2 damage to any target. If this spell was kicked, it deals 4 damage instead.

data.name: Bushwhack
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
• Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

data.name: Cancel
data.oracle_text: Counter target spell.
data.flavor_text: "I decide what stands in my way."

data.name: Cathar Commando
data.oracle_text:
Flash
{1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.
data.flavor_text: "Honorable tactics are for honorable foes. These werewolves are preying on innocent travelers. I'll stab them in the back while they sleep if I have to."

data.name: Chandra, Flameshaper
data.oracle_text:
+2: Add {R}{R}{R}. Exile the top three cards of your library. Choose one. You may play that card this turn.
+1: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control, except it has haste and "At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice this token."
−4: Chandra deals 8 damage divided as you choose among any number of target creatures and/or planeswalkers.

data.name: Day of Judgment
data.oracle_text: Destroy all creatures.
data.flavor_text: Clerics on both sides prayed for divine intervention to end the war. The gods didn't play favorites.

data.name: Deadly Brew
data.oracle_text: Each player sacrifices a creature or planeswalker of their choice. If you sacrificed a permanent this way, you may return another permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.
data.flavor_text: No one ever asked what was in Dina's concoctions, so long as they worked.

data.name: Deadly Plot
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Destroy target creature or planeswalker.
• Return target Zombie creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.
data.flavor_text:
"Open grave available, only one previous tenant."
—Sign on cemetery gate

data.name: Deadly Riposte
data.oracle_text: Deadly Riposte deals 3 damage to target tapped creature and you gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text:
"Automatons are fast, precise, and tireless, but they all share one weakness: predictability. Learn their patterns. Strike when they're vulnerable."
—Horance, Urzan general

data.name: Deathmark
data.oracle_text: Destroy target green or white creature.
data.flavor_text:
"I hope it's true that every snowflake is unique, because I never want to see one like this again. Now clean up that body."
—Thangbrand Gyrdsson, Kjeldoran patrol

data.name: Demolition Field
data.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Destroy target nonbasic land an opponent controls. That land's controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. You may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

data.name: Demonic Pact
data.oracle_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one that hasn't been chosen —
• This enchantment deals 4 damage to any target and you gain 4 life.
• Target opponent discards two cards.
• Draw two cards.
• You lose the game.

data.name: Devout Decree
data.oracle_text: Exile target creature or planeswalker that's black or red. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
data.flavor_text:
"It is not punishment. I am simply making things as they should be."
—Sephara, Sky's Blade

data.name: Disenchant
data.oracle_text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.
data.flavor_text: Even millennia later, some war machines from the devastating Brothers' War continue to function. Thankfully, the weapons meant to destroy them still work too.

data.name: Drakuseth, Maw of Flames
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever Drakuseth attacks, it deals 4 damage to any target and 3 damage to each of up to two other targets.
data.flavor_text:
"Spread out, you idiots! Spread out!"
—Marsden, party leader, last words

data.name: Eaten Alive
data.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or pay {3}{B}.
Exile target creature or planeswalker.
data.flavor_text:
"If you hear a groaning noise in the cellar, don't investigate. Don't split up. Just lock the door and barricade it."
—Emili, guard captain

data.name: Eaten by Piranhas
data.oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a black Skeleton creature with base power and toughness 1/1. (It loses all other colors, card types, and creature types.)

data.name: Elspeth's Smite
data.oracle_text: Elspeth's Smite deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.
data.flavor_text: Elesh Norn screamed as the light pierced her. Her nightmare had become flesh.

data.name: Essence Scatter
data.oracle_text: Counter target creature spell.
data.flavor_text:
"The greatest victory is a battle unfought."
—*Tome of Obstructions*

data.name: Exclusion Mage
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, return target creature an opponent controls to its owner's hand.
data.flavor_text: Successful battles start with knowing who's worth fighting.

data.name: Fanatical Firebrand
data.oracle_text:
Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)
{T}, Sacrifice this creature: It deals 1 damage to any target.
data.flavor_text:
"The Brazen Coalition is a firecannon pointed at our enemies. Goblins like him are the spark to its powder."
—Admiral Beckett Brass

data.name: Feed the Swarm
data.oracle_text: Destroy target creature or enchantment an opponent controls. You lose life equal to that permanent's mana value.
data.flavor_text:
"On vile wings and bloody wind, the swarm will rise."
—Skyclave inscription

data.name: Felidar Cub
data.oracle_text: Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target enchantment.
data.flavor_text: Felidars that make it through their first year of life can easily live to see a hundred years more.

data.name: Felling Blow
data.oracle_text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Then that creature deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.
data.flavor_text: "You are not welcome in Skemfar."

data.name: Fiery Annihilation
data.oracle_text: Fiery Annihilation deals 5 damage to target creature. Exile up to one target Equipment attached to that creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.
data.flavor_text:
"Fireproof or your money back!"
—Jornald's Arms and Armor (out of business)

data.name: Firebrand Archer
data.oracle_text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.
data.flavor_text: A word of vengeance, and her arrows awaken in flame.

data.name: Firespitter Whelp
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever you cast a noncreature or Dragon spell, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.
data.flavor_text: In subsequent terms, first-year students were prohibited from enrolling in Introduction to Dragonkeeping.

data.name: Flashfreeze
data.oracle_text: Counter target red or green spell.
data.flavor_text:
"Your downfall was not your ignorance, your weakness, or your hubris, but your warm blood."
—Heidar, Rimewind master

data.name: Fumigate
data.oracle_text: Destroy all creatures. You gain 1 life for each creature destroyed this way.
data.flavor_text:
"Ghirapur's gremlin population poses a threat to the infrastructure of the fairgrounds. Threats must be eliminated."
—Sram, senior edificer

data.name: Garna, Bloodfist of Keld
data.oracle_text: Whenever another creature you control dies, draw a card if it was attacking. Otherwise, Garna deals 1 damage to each opponent.
data.flavor_text: Keldons live for the fervor of battle, as eager to receive scars as they are to give them.

data.name: Gatekeeper of Malakir
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {B} (You may pay an additional {B} as you cast this spell.)
When this creature enters, if it was kicked, target player sacrifices a creature of their choice.
data.flavor_text: "You may enter the city—once the toll is paid."

data.name: Goblin Firebomb
data.oracle_text:
Flash
{7}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Destroy target permanent.
data.flavor_text:
"And if this works, Tawnos is gonna let us build the full-sized version!"
—Tergel, goblin explosioneer

data.name: Goblin Negotiation
data.oracle_text: Goblin Negotiation deals X damage to target creature. Create a number of 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens equal to the amount of excess damage dealt to that creature this way.
data.flavor_text: Either you pay for Krenko's "protection" or you pay to replace your stall. Either way, you pay.

data.name: Gorehorn Raider
data.oracle_text: Raid — When this creature enters, if you attacked this turn, this creature deals 2 damage to any target.
data.flavor_text: Anyone fast enough to dodge her horns and parry her cutlass just gets kicked overboard.

data.name: Guttersnipe
data.oracle_text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature deals 2 damage to each opponent.
data.flavor_text:
"I'm not sure we can outlast them, Captain. Their ammunition appears to be lava, Captain."
—Stubert, pirate gunner

data.name: Harbinger of the Tides
data.oracle_text:
You may cast this spell as though it had flash if you pay {2} more to cast it. (You may cast it any time you could cast an instant.)
When this creature enters, you may return target tapped creature an opponent controls to its owner's hand.

data.name: Heartfire Immolator
data.oracle_text:
Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)
{R}, Sacrifice this creature: It deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker.
data.flavor_text: "I'd rather go out in a blaze of glory than fade away and be forgotten."

data.name: Hero's Downfall
data.oracle_text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker.
data.flavor_text: Odric resisted the vampire's curse with all his strength. But after a lifetime of fighting monsters, he was doomed to become one himself.

data.name: Hidetsugu's Second Rite
data.oracle_text: If target player has exactly 10 life, Hidetsugu's Second Rite deals 10 damage to that player.
data.flavor_text: Once a mortal ogre, Hidetsugu devoured his demonic patron and transcended mortality in a fit of rage.

data.name: Impact Tremors
data.oracle_text: Whenever a creature you control enters, this enchantment deals 1 damage to each opponent.
data.flavor_text:
"If their ears are to the ground, we will make them bleed!"
—Taklai, Kolaghan warrior

data.name: Imprisoned in the Moon
data.oracle_text:
Enchant creature, land, or planeswalker
Enchanted permanent is a colorless land with "{T}: Add {C}" and loses all other card types and abilities.
data.flavor_text: Only one vault was great enough to hold Emrakul.

data.name: Incinerating Blast
data.oracle_text:
Incinerating Blast deals 6 damage to target creature.
You may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.
data.flavor_text: Most pyromancers could never summon the sheer heat necessary to melt solid rock, but most pyromancers aren't Chandra Nalaar.

data.name: Into the Roil
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {1}{U} (You may pay an additional {1}{U} as you cast this spell.)
Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. If this spell was kicked, draw a card.
data.flavor_text: In theory, the death of the Eldrazi should have stilled the Roil. It did not.

data.name: Joust Through
data.oracle_text: Joust Through deals 3 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. You gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: "Allow me to offer a counterpoint."

data.name: Liliana, Dreadhorde General
data.oracle_text:
Whenever a creature you control dies, draw a card.
+1: Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.
−4: Each player sacrifices two creatures of their choice.
−9: Each opponent chooses a permanent they control of each permanent type and sacrifices the rest.

data.name: Luminous Rebuke
data.oracle_text:
This spell costs {3} less to cast if it targets a tapped creature.
Destroy target creature.
data.flavor_text: The monstrous bird swooped in for the kill, only to be met by a concentrated blast of pure, searing moonlight.

data.name: Maelstrom Pulse
data.oracle_text: Destroy target nonland permanent and all other permanents with the same name as that permanent.
data.flavor_text: During the collision of the shards, entire ways of life disappeared without a trace.

data.name: Make Your Move
data.oracle_text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with power 4 or greater.
data.flavor_text:
"If you're thinking only one step ahead, you're already falling behind."
—Teysa

data.name: Massacre Wurm
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, creatures your opponents control get -2/-2 until end of turn.
Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, that player loses 2 life.

data.name: Meteor Golem
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, destroy target nonland permanent an opponent controls.
data.flavor_text: The impact sent the soldiers scattering—then something came out of the crater.

data.name: Mindsparker
data.oracle_text:
First strike (This creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
Whenever an opponent casts a white or blue instant or sorcery spell, this creature deals 2 damage to that player.

data.name: Moment of Craving
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. You gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text: The vampires of the Dusk Legion undertake Blood Fasts to strengthen their wills, but not all can control their hunger.

data.name: Mortify
data.oracle_text: Destroy target creature or enchantment.
data.flavor_text: The queen sent her champion to defeat the necromancer threat. His helmet was returned the next day, warped and stained with blood.

data.name: Negate
data.oracle_text: Counter target noncreature spell.
data.flavor_text: "As one, nature lifts its voice to tell you this: 'No.'"

data.name: Obliterating Bolt
data.oracle_text: Obliterating Bolt deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If that creature or planeswalker would die this turn, exile it instead.
data.flavor_text: In desperation, Pero called on his memory of a lightning storm that nearly killed his family. When he opened his eyes, only smoke and dust remained.

data.name: Pacifism
data.oracle_text:
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature can't attack or block.
data.flavor_text:
"If only they'd all act this docile. I could do something relaxing for a living. I've always wanted to bake biscuits."
—Ethuk, Coppercoat mage

data.name: Perforating Artist
data.oracle_text:
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
Raid — At the beginning of your end step, if you attacked this turn, each opponent loses 3 life unless that player sacrifices a nonland permanent of their choice or discards a card.
data.flavor_text: The first three rows of the audience are marketed as the "slash zone."

data.name: Prayer of Binding
data.oracle_text:
Flash
When this enchantment enters, exile up to one target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. You gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text:
"We do not make martyrs of villains. We leave them and their vile ideologies to be forgotten."
—Lyra Dawnbringer

data.name: Primal Might
data.oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +X/+X until end of turn. Then it fights up to one target creature you don't control. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)
data.flavor_text: The shaman looked at the world through Ghalta's eyes and understood that everything else was his prey.

data.name: Reclamation Sage
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may destroy target artifact or enchantment.
data.flavor_text: "What was once formed by masons, shaped by smiths, or given life by mages, I will return to the embrace of the earth."

data.name: Refute
data.oracle_text: Counter target spell. Draw a card, then discard a card.
data.flavor_text: "I said *no*!"

data.name: River's Rebuke
data.oracle_text: Return all nonland permanents target player controls to their owner's hand.
data.flavor_text: The waters that give the River Herald merfolk their name are sacred to their culture; they do not abide invaders to sail upon them.

data.name: Run Away Together
data.oracle_text: Choose two target creatures controlled by different players. Return those creatures to their owners' hands.
data.flavor_text:
"Virtue is virtue, whatever the heart that nurtures it."
—Malacan, Vantress exile

data.name: Scorching Dragonfire
data.oracle_text: Scorching Dragonfire deals 3 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If that creature or planeswalker would die this turn, exile it instead.
data.flavor_text: As the blaze raced toward her, Syr Ameril closed her eyes and pictured Castle Ardenvale so her last thoughts would be of home.

data.name: Seeker's Folly
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Target opponent discards two cards.
• Creatures your opponents control get -1/-1 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: While searching the foreboding woods for his favorite helmet, Syr Verlor lost his second-favorite helmet.

data.name: Seismic Rupture
data.oracle_text: Seismic Rupture deals 2 damage to each creature without flying.
data.flavor_text: The raiding party advanced on the lone figure, confident they had her cornered and helpless. Then she raised her hands, and the ground opened with a fiery roar.

data.name: Skeleton Archer
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, it deals 1 damage to any target.
data.flavor_text:
"Soul, flesh, even eyes—none of these are strictly necessary for deadly precision."
—Modriss of Zargoth Fen

data.name: Slagstorm
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Slagstorm deals 3 damage to each creature.
• Slagstorm deals 3 damage to each player.
data.flavor_text:
"As long as we have the will to fight, we are never without weapons."
—Koth of the Hammer

data.name: Spitfire Lagac
data.oracle_text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.
data.flavor_text:
"If you hear a choking sort of cough, it's about to get really hot."
—Raff Slugeater, goblin shortcutter

data.name: Stab
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Elgin's final mistake was assuming an intruder would come through the door, and not up the sheer, smooth, six-story wall.

data.name: Starlight Snare
data.oracle_text:
Enchant creature
When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature.
Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step.

data.name: Stasis Snare
data.oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
When this enchantment enters, exile target creature an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

data.name: Steel Hellkite
data.oracle_text:
Flying
{2}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
{X}: Destroy each nonland permanent with mana value X whose controller was dealt combat damage by this creature this turn. Activate only once each turn.

data.name: Stroke of Midnight
data.oracle_text: Destroy target nonland permanent. Its controller creates a 1/1 white Human creature token.
data.flavor_text:
"Who was that knight, so graceful and strong? Why did she flee before the food was gone?"
—*Tale of the Masked Maiden*

data.name: Thrashing Brontodon
data.oracle_text: {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.
data.flavor_text: It cares more about preserving the herd's territory than about preserving itself.

data.name: Time Stop
data.oracle_text: End the turn. (Exile all spells and abilities, including this spell. The player whose turn it is discards down to their maximum hand size. Damage heals and "this turn" and "until end of turn" effects end.)

data.name: Tragic Banshee
data.oracle_text: Morbid — When this creature enters, target creature an opponent controls gets -1/-1 until end of turn. If a creature died this turn, that creature gets -13/-13 until end of turn instead.
data.flavor_text: She attended her own burial service, eager for company.

data.name: Tribute to Hunger
data.oracle_text: Target opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice. You gain life equal to that creature's toughness.
data.flavor_text:
"Secluded park. Dual puncture wounds. I told you these aren't random murders. Get the stakes ready."
—Rem Karolus, monster slayer

data.name: Trygon Predator
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may destroy target artifact or enchantment that player controls.
data.flavor_text: Held aloft by metabolized magic, trygons are ravenous for sources of mystic fuel.

data.name: Uncharted Voyage
data.oracle_text:
Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library.
Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
data.flavor_text: As his ship passed the waterlogged wrecks, Markos realized he wasn't the first person to try sailing out of the Underworld.

data.name: Unsummon
data.oracle_text: Return target creature to its owner's hand.
data.flavor_text: Tolarian apprentices learn to liberate aetheric energy long before they are taught to bind it.

data.name: Valorous Stance
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Target creature gains indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)
• Destroy target creature with toughness 4 or greater.
data.flavor_text:
"Every choice alters the path of fate."
—Sarkhan Vol

data.name: Viashino Pyromancer
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, it deals 2 damage to target player or planeswalker.
data.flavor_text: "I trained with the Ghitu, and I respect the fire as they do."

data.name: Vivien Reid
data.oracle_text:
+1: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
−3: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying.
−8: You get an emblem with "Creatures you control get +2/+2 and have vigilance, trample, and indestructible."

data.name: Volley Veteran
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, it deals damage to target creature an opponent controls equal to the number of Goblins you control.
data.flavor_text: They didn't fire in unison, nor in the same direction. Most didn't even use arrows. Somehow it worked perfectly.

data.name: Voracious Greatshark
data.oracle_text:
Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)
When this creature enters, counter target artifact or creature spell.
data.flavor_text: There is no boat big enough.

data.name: Witness Protection
data.oracle_text:
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a green and white Citizen creature with base power and toughness 1/1 named Legitimate Businessperson. (It loses all other colors, card types, creature types, and names.)
